title: Support Center
description: Find answers to common questions about Wellsy.
noReplyNote: Note: This email address may change in the future. Always check this page for the latest contact details.

faqs.q: How do I delete my account?
faqs.a: In the app: Profile tab → Settings (gear icon) → Account → Delete Account. All data (food logs, weight, sleep, group content, images) will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

faqs.q: How do I reset my password?
faqs.a:
On the login screen, tap "Forgot password" and enter your registered email. You'll receive a reset link.

If you signed in with Apple or Google, no password is needed.

faqs.q: Apple / Google sign-in isn't working. What should I do?
faqs.a:
Try the following:

① Check your Apple ID or Google account settings on the device
② Force-quit and reopen the app
③ Restart your device

If the issue persists, contact wellsy.support@gmail.com with your OS and app version.

faqs.q: How do I transfer my data to a new device?
faqs.a: Simply sign in with the same account (Apple ID, Google account, or email) on the new device. All data syncs automatically.

faqs.q: How do I delete specific logs?
faqs.a: Open the log detail screen and tap the delete button. To delete everything, delete your account.

faqs.q: What happens to my data when I delete my account?
faqs.a: Deleting your account triggers our Cloud Functions (deleteUserData), which removes all your data from Firebase. This is irreversible.
In-app export is in development. To exercise your GDPR or CCPA data portability right, email wellsy.support@gmail.com (subject: Data Portability Request).

faqs.q: How do I request access, correction, or deletion of my personal data?
faqs.a: Email wellsy.support@gmail.com from your registered address (subject: Privacy Request). For GDPR requests, include "GDPR" in the subject line.

faqs.q: The AI analysis result seems inaccurate. What can I do?
faqs.a:
AI food analysis is an estimate from OpenAI API. Accuracy depends on photo angle, lighting, and dish type.

Tips for better results:
· Shoot from directly above or at 45°
· Photograph mixed dishes separately

For precise nutritional info, check the food packaging or consult a dietitian. This feature is not for medical use.

faqs.q: How many AI analyses can I use per day?
faqs.a: Free plan: 1 photo analysis/day and 1 text analysis/day (each). The count resets at midnight JST. Premium plan: unlimited.

faqs.q: I'm not receiving notifications. What should I do?
faqs.a:
iOS: Settings → Notifications → Wellsy → Allow Notifications (enable)
Android: Settings → Apps → Wellsy → Notifications (enable)

Restart the app after changing settings. If issues persist, contact wellsy.support@gmail.com.

faqs.q: How do I leave a group?
faqs.a: Groups → select group → Group Settings → Leave Group. We recommend deleting your posts/comments first.

faqs.q: I was invited but can't join a group.
faqs.a:
Check:
① The invite code (6 chars) is entered correctly
② The code hasn't expired (ask the group admin to re-issue)
③ You haven't reached the 1-group limit (free plan)
④ Your join request may be pending admin approval

faqs.q: How long are group posts visible?
faqs.a: Group posts are automatically deleted 24 hours after posting by our Cloud Functions. Comments, reactions, and selfie photos are also deleted at that time.

faqs.q: A group member posted inappropriate content. What can I do?
faqs.a: Use the in-app report feature, or email wellsy.support@gmail.com (subject: Report inappropriate content) with the content description and date.

faqs.q: What features does the Premium plan include?
faqs.a:
Premium plan benefits:

· AI food analysis (photo & text): unlimited
· AI correction & re-analysis feature
· Full history access (all time)
· Unlimited group membership
· Unrestricted nutrition goal adjustments
· Full streak count display

Available as monthly or annual subscription via App Store (iOS) or Google Play (Android).

faqs.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
faqs.a:
iPhone/iPad: Settings → your name → Subscriptions → Wellsy → Cancel Subscription

Android: Google Play → Menu → Subscriptions → Wellsy → Cancel

Cancel before the next renewal date. You retain access until the end of the billing period.
